case_title: FIRE & SECURITY ALARM CO. VS. APPLIED ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION MANAGEMENT, INC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRE & SECURITY ALARM CO. AS TO DEFENDANT APPLIED ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION MANAGEMENT, INC DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-27-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-26-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-04-2016
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 58754599) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRE & SECURITY ALARM CO. JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-27-2016 CONTINUED TO JUL-27-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 58781990) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF FIRE & SECURITY ALARM CO. AS TO DEFENDANT APPLIED ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION MANAGEMENT, INC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 58868662), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRE & SECURITY ALARM CO. SERVED JAN-22-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT APPLIED ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION MANAGEMENT, INC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 58868666) AS TO DEFENDANT APPLIED ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION MANAGEMENT, INC

RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APPLIED ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION MANAGEMENT, INC $16,352.09 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,802.09, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 59138388)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-27-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
